summary: - **Author:** Fable (interpretation agent), 2026-07-11. The NLB-0-A runner produced the measured artifacts and the diagnostic readout (`docs/next/analysis/nlb-0a.md`); that document explicitly reserves the interpretive assessment ("Fable interp + coordinator mechanical verdict-gen follow"). This document is that interpretation. Per the frozen design's own status law there is NO verdict to generate: NLB-0 is a design-phase diagnostic by construction — "nothing here may feed a verdict-gen or subst
title: FABLE INTERPRETATION — NLB-0-A (design-phase diagnostic; NO verdict object exists or is owed: the §7.1 proceed condition is measured NOT MET, with the two arms failing on OPPOSITE legs — primary inventory-B kills the dangerous class completely (43 → 0 wrong, S1 106/106) at a −0.116 retention cost that is exactly the container-ask mass; the a5 dangerous class is measured to be an irreducible two-op surface ambiguity, NOT the direction-table defect the design assumed; l3a's sibling class IS repairable at source with retention IMPROVING; no registered cycle is consumed; neither programme thesis moves)
